results.rendered_html:
āṅgūṣa m. lauter Preis, Loblied: asmā idu tyamupamaṃ svarṣāṃ bharāmyāṅgūṣamāsyena [Page1-0604]  ṚV. 1,61,3 . 2 . 62,1 . 105,19 . 138,2 . 3,58,5 . āṅgūṣebhirgṛṇānaḥ satyadhārāḥ 4,29,1 . 5,74,8 . 7,24,3 . 94,11 .  NIR. 5,11 . n.: asmā etanmahyāṅgūṣamasmā indrāya stotraṃ matibhiravāci  ṚV. 6,34,5 . 1,117,10 .
— Vgl. aṅgūṣa und aṅgoṣin.
